positions.detail: Too Many Requests. Rate limited. Try after a while.

agent_analysis:
## Thursday Position Monitor — ELEVATED Urgency

### Status: NO POSITIONS TO MONITOR

No position data was provided. This means one of three things:

1. **All positions were already closed** (stops hit or targets taken earlier this week)
2. **Data feed failure** — no market data AND no position data suggests a pipeline issue
3. **No trades were entered Monday** (all three candidates failed the gap-skip or delta-drift confirmation gates)

Additionally: **No market data available** — VIX regime, breadth, and credit spread context are all blind. On a Thursday with ELEVATED urgency, this is a problem.

---

### Recommendation

**VERIFY PIPELINE STATUS IMMEDIATELY.**

If positions are open but not showing here, we're flying blind on the highest-theta day of the week. Charm acceleration means a position that was -20% at Wednesday close could be -40% by noon Thursday. Manual check of broker account required.

If no positions are open — nothing to do. Prep for Friday close-out protocol (everything by 2 PM ET) in case any stragglers exist.
